title: How to write a page
text:
With some text inside the section


One can use in-line LaTeX equations, like \(x^2+y^2=r^2\), or in their own line, like
\[x=\frac{-b\pm \sqrt{b^2-4ac}}{2a}\]
This is an italic text and bold text. One can also insert an unsorted list

Element
Element
Element

And a sorted list:

Element 1
Element 2
Element 3

And a nested list:

level 1 item

level 2 item
level 2 item

level 3 item
level 3 item

Head 3

This is a quote:

“If it is on the internet… it must be true.” - Abraham Lincoln

This is a picture



Octocat


One can also insert in-line code. But one can also insert code with highlighted syntax
int suma (){
  int a, b;
  return a+b;
}
This is an internal link to a section in the same page. This is an external link to a section in another page.
Finally, one can also insert HTML code directly:

title: Scientific Wiki Template
text: Github Pages template for a wiki-like page that renders LaTeX equations and citations automatically.
